patterns.name: Decision Maker
patterns.description: Irregular intervals that mirror match reality. Impossible to predict — your brain must stay active throughout.

patterns.name: Match Tempo
patterns.description: Simulates the variation of real match pace — periods of high pressure followed by breathing room.

patterns.name: Pre-Match Warmup
patterns.description: Progressively faster intervals that warm up your scanning readiness from calm to match focus.

patterns.name: Defender Focus
patterns.description: Consistent tempo with gradual acceleration — designed specifically for fullbacks and centre-backs.
